hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *"git push"*) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/server" && npm test >/tmp/sellerhub-pretest.log 2>&1 || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"npm test (server/) fehlgeschlagen — Push blockiert. Details: /tmp/sellerhub-pretest.log"}}';; esac

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *"railway up"*) sleep 5; BODY=$(curl -s -m 15 https://radar-production-388a.up.railway.app/api/health); OK=$(printf '%s' "$BODY" | jq -r '.ok // "?"' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); MSG="Post-Deploy-Healthcheck /api/health → ok=$OK"; printf '{"systemMessage":%s,"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":%s}}\n' "$(printf '%s' "$MSG" | jq -Rs .)" "$(printf '%s' "$MSG" | jq -Rs .)";; esac

hooks.statusMessage: Hole neuesten Stand von GitHub (git pull)…

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" sh -c 'git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -q -m "Auto-Sync beim Sitzungsende $(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")"; git push -q' 2>&1 || true
hooks.statusMessage: Sichere Änderungen zu GitHub (git commit & push)…
